prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-COUNTERFEITPEN-BLK Product Type: OFFICE_PRODUCTS Brand (from catalog): ASR Federal Existing Title: ASR Federal Counterfeit Bill Detector Pen US and International Currency Marker Description: Then the ASR Federal Counterfeit Banknote Detection Pen is the perfect tool for you.

This detector pen is filled with an iodine-based ink designed to be applied to banknotes in an attempt to determine authenticity. Most genuine banknotes are printed on paper made with cotton fibers and do not contain the starches that are reactive with iodine, so when the pen is used to mark genuine bills the mark will be yellowish or colorless. Counterfeit bills, however, are typically printed on photocopier paper or standard printer paper, so the ink from this pen will change to black if the bill is counterfeit. If the bill you test has a yellow/colorless mark, it is real. If the mark is black, it is fake.

Our counterfeit currency detector pen will provide results within seconds, and the mark will fade completely within a few hours. Search Terms: counterfeit pen detector bill money dri mark to check for bills marking Features: - COUNTERFEIT DETECTION INK - Filled with Iodine-based Ink Designed to Determine Currency Authenticity | Yellow Mark = Real, Black Mark = Counterfeit - RESULTS WITHIN SECONDS - Fast-acting Detection Ink Determines Authenticity Immediately | Catch Crooks Quickly without Inconveniencing Honest Customers - INK FADES QUICKLY - Ink Fades within Hours of Being Marked | Wont Ruin Genuine Currency or Prevent it From Being Used Later - WORKS ON US AND INTERNATIONAL CURRENCY: Compatible with Bill Currencies in Argentina, Brazil, Britain, Euro Countries, Hong Kong, Japan, Korea, Macao, Malaysia, New Zealand, Russia, South Africa, Taiwan, Thailand and USA - PROTECT YOUR BUSINESS - Inexpensive Way to Determine Authenticity at Point of Sale | Must-have Anti-counterfeit Detection Device for Business Owners, Entrepreneurs, Bank Tellers and Law Enforcement Officers === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Federal Counterfeit Bill Detector Pen Black

anthropic.title_differentiation: Iodine-Based Ink, Yellow Mark Is Real, Black Mark Is Counterfeit, Fast Results, Works On US And International Currency

openai.title_differentiation: Yellow Mark Is Real, Black Mark Is Counterfeit, Works On US And International Currency, Ink Fades Fast
